cases.prompt: Review tikv/pd PR #22101. The PR claims to fix a scheduler nil callback regression reported in a linked issue. Verify root-cause coverage, callback ordering risk, and whether the new tests really cover the reported trigger.

Review tikv/pd PR #22102. It changes TSO behavior in `pkg/mcs/**`, adjusts a user-facing default, and updates rollback notes. Focus on config compatibility, tests, and whether the PR description matches the actual rollout risk.

Review tikv/pd PR #22103. The diff mainly updates `.agents/skills/**`, `AGENTS.md`, and review guidance markdown. Check whether the AI-facing materials are accurate, scoped correctly, and still aligned with the documented review workflow.

Review tikv/pd PR #22104. It extracts shared config helpers, changes an API-facing default path, and moves logic between controller and manager layers. Verify boundary clarity, compatibility impact, and whether tests prove the behavior instead of only the refactor.
